SEARCH
Package com.lattice.metrics

Class EdgeMetrics

java.lang.Object
com.lattice.metrics.EdgeMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
WaitMetrics
public final class EdgeMetrics extends Object implements WaitMetrics
Live metrics for one edge.

Hot-path counters can be disabled with lattice.metrics.hotCounters. Residence-time histograms are opt-in through lattice.metrics.residence and histogram accessors return defensive copies. Runtime update methods such as recordEmit() are exposed for the runtime implementation and should not be called by applications.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EdgeMetrics(String from, String to)
    Creates on-heap edge metrics without an allocation owner.
    EdgeMetrics(String from, String to, String allocationOwner, MemoryMode.MemoryKind memoryKind)
    Creates edge metrics with allocation metadata.

    Returns the stage or subsystem that owns this edge allocation, when known.

    Returns total nanoseconds spent under edge backpressure.

    Returns offer attempts that had to wait for capacity.

    Returns branch-isolation actions taken for this edge.

    Returns offers merged by coalescing overflow policy.

    Returns items consumed from this edge when hot counters are enabled.

    Returns current logical depth, derived from emitted, consumed, and dropped oldest counts.

    Returns messages dropped by drop-latest/drop-newest policy.

    Returns approximate offer throughput since metric creation.
